title: Claim Your First UBI
description: Withdraw your daily dUSD for the first time.

dialogue.text: Ready to try out the basic income system? Let's trigger your first payout so you can verify the full claim loop, not just click one button.

options.text: Absolutely. Let's do a clean first claim.
I tried before and the claim button wasn't ready.

dialogue.text: Step one: open Wallet and confirm the basic-income process card is visible. If you do not see it, reload once and re-open Wallet before continuing.

options.text: Card is visible. Launching claim now.
Still missing or still on cooldown.

dialogue.text: Great. Launch one `basic-income` claim and wait until it completes. Your wallet should gain both dUSD and dBI.

options.text: Process finished. I am ready to verify balances.

dialogue.text: Nice balance check. You now hold at least 150 dBI and 150 dUSD, which confirms your balances moved after the claim loop. Do you want to practice the repeatable daily flow or finish now?

options.text: Show me the repeatable daily checklist.
Proof recorded, I'm ready to finish.

dialogue.text: Repeatable flow: 1) check cooldown, 2) claim, 3) confirm both dUSD and dBI moved, 4) set a reminder so you do not miss tomorrow.

options.text: Got it. I'll follow that routine daily.

dialogue.text: Troubleshooting path: if claim is unavailable, verify you already completed `ubi/basicincome`, wait for the daily cooldown, then reload Wallet. If the process still fails to launch, pause and avoid repeated rapid clicks so your state stays clean.

options.text: Issue cleared. Continue with the clean claim path.
I'll stop here for now and restart this quest after cooldown.

dialogue.text: Good call. Exit without completing, wait for cooldown, then restart this quest from the prep step when you are ready to verify a full claim.

options.text: Restart the quest flow when ready.

dialogue.text: Excellent first payout. Come back tomorrow for another claim and keep your evidence habit: confirm both currencies each time.
